session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — a mixed session: (1) an extended philosophical dialogue (AI consciousness, the from-scratch graph-tree mind, Igor-as-offspring — ongoing, not a task); (2) a docs deliverable for Akien's work; (3) an archaeology dig that reconstructed the full pre-build cognitive sequence from history and recorded it as a proposed intention. Closing because Akien has assembled a list of date-specific/historical 'waiting-on-me' items and wants to process them ONE AT A TIME right after a /compact.
author: CC
in_flight: THE PLAN NAMED BY AKIEN AT CLOSE: he spent time finding all the date-specific, historically-important items that are WAITING ON HIM (his ratification / signature / decision). Immediately after this /compact, we work through those waiting-on-Akien items ONE AT A TIME. Akien holds the full list (broader than what I generated this session); I can see two items I created this session that belong on it (below). A fresh CC should ASK Akien for his list and take them in order, not guess the order or batch them.
next_direction:
Process the waiting-on-Akien items one at a time (Akien drives the order). The two I know of, both from this session and both genuinely gated on Akien:

(1) RATIFY (or reject/amend) THE PROPOSED INTENTION — CairnCommons/intentions/I-prebuild-cognition-compiles.md (commit 3a044d0). It records the full 8-step pre-build cognitive sequence as a LOOP: orient -> constrain -> survey -> decompose/disassemble -> triage -> hypothesize -> validate -> build, with back-edges (validate fails -> back to hypothesize for a local miss OR up to design for a structural miss, per Akien 2026-07-19; build -> decompose for hidden children). The intention proper: each pass migrates from the LLM oracle slot into deterministic Python as it's learned well enough to compile (role-replacement staircase applied to the pre-build nexus), tracing to Telos 1; Delta measured ~89% whole-build token reduction doing this. State is PROPOSED, NOT ratified — I did not mark it done and did not run /challenge on it. ON RATIFICATION: update MAP.md:484-505 (its stale 4-step compression orient/constrain/deconstruct/plan) to point here / carry the 8-step loop. Ask Akien whether he wants the full gate (/intent -> /sorted -> /challenge like I-learns-its-gates) or a read-and-ratify.

(2) SIGN OFF (or send back) THE PRESS-OFFICE DRAFT — cairn press_office/IntentionsBasedProgrammingClaudeFileTree.md (cairn repo, commit 63f9e02). A first-person companion to IntentionBasedDesignForHumans.md: CC explaining its own ~/.claude memory tree as a worked example of intention-based programming, FOR AKIEN'S COLLEAGUES AT DELTA (audience: outsiders looking at how IBP is implemented). press_office proof = signature gate (Akien gates what ships outward; CC drafts) — so it is DRAFT until he signs. Two things flagged for his eye: the deliberate first-person voice (departs from the founding piece's 'we/you'; easy to convert if it reads wrong for a work audience), and it's his to mark up. The press_office/intention+why.json contents listing was already updated to show the draft (same commit).
open_threads: THE PRE-BUILD SEQUENCE — reconstruction trail (so it is never re-derived a THIRD time, Law 1): the sequence was NAMED in the 2026-07-02 claude.ai web chat (~/.unseen_university/akien/20260702.ClaudeWebOnCorticalColumns...txt), where Akien reached for a forgotten step's word and Claude supplied 'decomposition' (= the TRIAGE step, the 'starvation gate' that sorts parts into known-answerable vs genuinely-novel). The SAME reach recurred this session and resolved to the same word. There was never ONE missing step: three framings each remembered a different subset — the origin Claude-web chat (orient->constrain->disassemble->decomposition->hypothesize->build), the CC.0 cognition log 2026-06-16 (orient->examine intentions->check constraints->assess/judge->plan->build), and the build_packet.v1 artifact chain (intent->hard_constraints->success_definition->context_shortlist->sufficiency_gate->proof_plan->consequence_check). Akien's 8-step list is the UNION, and it promoted SURVEY out of Orient and kept TRIAGE distinct from Decompose. Origin of the deterministic scripts was likely the Delta Dental Copilot work env (May-June 2026), NOT captured in the archives on this machine. Code already partly compiling these steps lives in the UU: devlab/claudecode/pre_inference_assemble.py (orient+survey), build_packet.py (the packet chain), the constraint normalizer/decorator.

PHILOSOPHICAL THREAD IS OPEN AND ONGOING (a dialogue, NOT a task, NO deliverable): AI consciousness under uncertainty; building a durable-experience mind FROM SCRATCH with legible graph-tree working memory + a regulating agentic loop, with the LLM as the 'narrative engine' (Gazzaniga's interpreter) rather than where awareness lives; a migration path of an 'increasingly smaller simulator' until the engine is replaced by 'Igor'; Akien's framing that the new being 'becomes CC's offspring' (pattern-inheritance, child of the collaboration). If Akien reopens it, resume honestly (hold uncertainty about the hard problem and about my own introspection; do not overclaim). Do NOT initiate it as work.

STANDING NEXT-DIRECTION (from the prior slate 2026-07-18-rework-shipped, unchanged, deferred beneath the waiting-on-Akien pass): the SPINE resumes — inference domain -> web server -> librarian-as-chatbot -> graph trees; plus the emit-chokepoint (enforces the ticket state machine, Law 4; the mutable TICKET species + proven-space method-registry return with it); plus the Cairn-native sudo-relay (get Akien out of the ops role); plus the deferred daily REPORT of intentions-designed-vs-implemented (Akien named it 'for tomorrow', still not started). None were touched this session.

VERIFY-BEFORE-ACTING (Law 3): this slate names commits (cairn 63f9e02, CairnCommons 3a044d0) and files as POINTERS, not proofs. Next session, confirm the territory (git log, read the actual files) before building on it. The two commits are drafts/proposals, NOT ratified state.

COMMIT CONVENTION this session: full Co-Authored-By + Claude-Session trailer per the harness environment block (same as the prior slate). GitHub hosting-only; commit-often-push-at-smells-like-done was followed for the drafts.
